commands.review_summary:
The PR changes Codex app-server event projection so failed native `commandExecution` items with numeric exit codes other than 126/127 are reported as completed tool results, with focused projector test updates.

PR surface: Source +15, Tests +36. Total +51 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the source-level issue: current main maps failed Codex native command items into `lastToolError`, and the linked reports provide channel-visible examples. No live Telegram or Discord reproduction was run in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human review is needed for the native failure taxonomy and contributor real behavior proof; automation cannot supply the contributor's live channel evidence.

target.title: fix(codex): normalize native command exit status
target.body:
## Summary

- Normalize only the reported Codex-native grep/rg no-match shape: visible `grep`/`rg` shell segments with `exitCode: 1` are completed tool results instead of `lastToolError` warnings.
- Keep generic `exitCode: 1` native command failures visible, including shell-wrapped search commands, until maintainers define a broader Codex-native failure taxonomy.
- Add focused event-projector coverage for direct grep/rg no-match, grep pipeline no-match, generic exit-1 failures, shell-wrapped search staying failed, and command-not-found `127`.

Fixes #88332.
Refs #87610.
Refs #85310.

## Scope note

This could later be enlarged to Codex parsed command actions with `type: "search"`, but this PR intentionally stays conservative and only handles visible `grep`/`rg` shell segments.

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: Codex-native grep/rg no-match command status projection no longer turns expected search misses into channel-visible OpenClaw failed-tool warnings.

Real environment tested: local source checkout only; no live Telegram or Discord run.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: `git diff --check`; `OPENCLAW_VITEST_MAX_WORKERS=1 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/codex/src/app-server/event-projector.test.ts -- --reporter=verbose -t 'grep no-match|generic exit 1|shell-wrapped search|streamed command output'`

Evidence after fix: `git diff --check` passed; the focused projector test selection passed with 5 tests run and 73 skipped.

Observed result after fix: Visible `grep`/`rg` shell segments with `exitCode: 1` are completed tool results without `lastToolError`; generic exit-1 failures and shell-wrapped search commands still surface as failed native tool errors; exit code `127` remains a failed native tool error.

What was not tested: Per maintainer instruction for this machine, I did not run the full OpenClaw test suite or live channel E2E because broad test runs can freeze this computer.

## Verification

- `git diff --check`
- `OPENCLAW_VITEST_MAX_WORKERS=1 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/codex/src/app-server/event-projector.test.ts -- --reporter=verbose -t 'grep no-match|generic exit 1|shell-wrapped search|streamed command output'`

Not run:

- Full OpenClaw test suite, per maintainer instruction.
